derivation_layer.source_latex:
% BEGIN TZP DERIVATION LAYER
\tzpsection{Derivation Layer}
\begin{enumerate}[leftmargin=1.6em,itemsep=7pt,topsep=4pt]
\item
\[
\mathcal{L}_{\mathrm{total}}=\frac{1}{2}\boldsymbol{\omega}\cdot(\mathbb{I}\boldsymbol{\omega})+\frac{1}{2}m\dot{\mathbf r}^{2}+\frac{\varepsilon_{0}}{2}\int\left(\frac{\partial\mathbf A}{\partial t}\right)^{2}d^{3}x+\frac{\rho}{2}\int\dot{\mathbf u}^{2}d^{3}x-\frac{\rho c_{s}^{2}}{2}\int(\nabla\cdot\mathbf u)^{2}d^{3}x-\boldsymbol{\mu}\cdot\mathbf B_{\mathrm{ext}}+\lambda_{g}\int\mathbf u\cdot(\nabla\times\mathbf B)d^{3}x
\]
This line is the 1 source equation retained from TZPQVTVerificationSuite.txt for the TZPQVTVerificationSuite packet.
\item
\[
T_{\mathrm{gyro}}=\frac{1}{2}\boldsymbol{\omega}\cdot(\mathbb{I}\boldsymbol{\omega})
\]
This line is the 2 source equation retained from TZPQVTVerificationSuite.txt for the TZPQVTVerificationSuite packet.
\item
\[
T_{\mathrm{em}}=\frac{\varepsilon_{0}}{2}\int\left(\frac{\partial\mathbf A}{\partial t}\right)^{2}d^{3}x
\]
This line is the 3 source equation retained from TZPQVTVerificationSuite.txt for the TZPQVTVerificationSuite packet.
\item
\[
\mathcal{L}_{\mathrm{couple}}=\lambda_{g}\int\mathbf u\cdot(\nabla\times\mathbf B)d^{3}x
\]
This line is the 4 source equation retained from TZPQVTVerificationSuite.txt for the TZPQVTVerificationSuite packet.
\end{enumerate}
% END TZP DERIVATION LAYER
